development.description: DutyHub is a digital duty scheduling platform for churches and communities. Organizers create events with duty slots, and volunteers book themselves in — simple, transparent, and reliable.
development.title: How It Works

apiIntegration.description: Browse available duty slots, book with one click, and manage your commitments from anywhere.
apiIntegration.title: Easy Booking

authentication.description: Your bookings are locked — only you or an admin can change them. No accidental overwrites.
authentication.title: Secure & Reliable

responsiveDesign.description: Works on your phone, tablet, or desktop — manage duties on the go.
responsiveDesign.title: Works Everywhere

items.1: Define duty slots with date, time, and location

items.4: See who's signed up at a glance

items.1: Book a slot with one click

items.4: Get a clear overview of availability

about.subtitle: Learn more about DutyHub and how it helps organize duty schedules.
about.title: About DutyHub

landing.authNote: Sign in to browse events and book your duties

easyToUse.description: Browse events, pick a slot, and book — it's that simple. No spreadsheets, no confusion.
easyToUse.title: Easy Booking

fastSecure.description: Your bookings are locked and can't be changed by others. Only you or an admin can cancel.
fastSecure.title: Locked Bookings

scalable.description: Whether it's a small gathering or a large church congress — DutyHub scales with your needs.
scalable.title: Any Event Size

showcase.title: See DutyHub in Action
showcase.subtitle: Explore the key features that make duty scheduling effortless.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Get a bird's-eye view of your events, bookings, and an interactive calendar — all in one place.

eventGroups.title: Event Groups
eventGroups.description: Organize related events into groups like conferences or festivals for easy management.

events.title: Events & Slots
events.description: Browse all duty events with inline slot previews, search, and smart filters.

eventDetail.title: Event Detail
eventDetail.description: See all available duty slots by day, book with one click, and track availability.

bookings.title: My Bookings
bookings.description: All your confirmed duties in one place — filter by upcoming, this month, or view all.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Stay informed with real-time notifications for bookings, events, and slot changes — right in your dashboard.

notificationPreferences.title: Notification Settings
notificationPreferences.description: Fine-tune how you receive notifications — via email, push, or Telegram — for each notification type.

userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.description: Admins can manage users, roles, and approval workflows from a central dashboard.

landing.subtitle: The digital duty scheduling platform for church events. Book your shifts for Pfingsten, Kirchentag, and more — simple, transparent, and reliable.

howItWorks.title: How Event Creation Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A step-by-step look at how organizers create events and generate duty slots in DutyHub.

details.title: 1. Event Details
details.description: Start by giving your event a name, description, location, and category. Optionally link it to an event group like a conference or festival.

dates.title: 2. Choose Dates
dates.description: Select a single date, a continuous date range, or pick specific individual dates. If linked to an event group, dates are constrained to the group's timeframe.

schedule.title: 3. Configure Schedule
schedule.description: Set the daily start and end times, slot duration (15 min to 2 hours), and how many volunteers each slot needs. Add per-date overrides for days with different hours.

remainder.title: 4. Handle Remainders
remainder.description: If the day doesn't divide evenly into slots, choose what to do with leftover time: drop it, create a shorter final slot, or extend the last slot to fill the gap.

preview.title: 5. Preview & Exclude
preview.description: See a real-time preview of all generated slots. Click any slot to exclude it before creating. The preview updates live as you adjust settings.

publish.title: 6. Publish & Manage
publish.description: Created events start as drafts. Publish when ready so volunteers can see and book slots. Add more slot batches later or regenerate slots without losing existing bookings.

batchSlots.title: Multi-Batch Slots
batchSlots.description: Add multiple slot batches to the same event with different schedules, locations, or time ranges.

smartRegeneration.title: Smart Regeneration
smartRegeneration.description: When you change a schedule, DutyHub matches existing slots by date and time — preserving bookings on unchanged slots.

dryRun.title: Dry-Run Preview
dryRun.description: Before regenerating, see exactly which slots will be added, removed, or kept — and which bookings would be affected.

overrides.title: Per-Day Overrides
overrides.description: Need different hours on Saturday? Add schedule overrides for specific dates without changing the rest of the event.
